title: OpenStax College Physics 2e
description: A source card for the OpenStax College Physics 2e textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax College Physics 2e covers motion, forces, energy, waves, electricity, magnetism, optics, atomic physics, and nuclear physics with applied examples.
Use this source for older students who need structured physics explanations, quantitative examples, and diagrams before or after hands-on investigations.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters or figures.
